hypothesis: A low-carbon aluminium supplier can reduce embodied emissions without unacceptable cost or quality impacts.
method: Test one low-carbon aluminium specification on a limited product batch.
decision_threshold: At least 25 percent embodied-carbon reduction with less than 5 percent cost increase and no quality failure

hypothesis: Verified material-impact information will improve sourcing decisions without delaying the product cycle.
method: Apply a Green Spectrum material-decision canvas to one seasonal collection.
decision_threshold: Improved traceability and sourcing confidence without collection delay
risk: Teams avoid use because it slows buying decisions

hypothesis: A sustainability decision prompt during SME loan review improves climate-risk consideration without unfair exclusion.
method: Pilot a decision prompt in SME loan review.
decision_threshold: Improved sustainability evidence with no adverse fairness pattern
risk: Prompt becomes a compliance tick-box or creates exclusion bias

hypothesis: Anaesthetic-impact feedback will reduce high-impact gas use without affecting patient outcomes.
method: Provide clinicians with anaesthetic-impact feedback in one theatre group.
decision_threshold: Reduced high-impact gas use with no patient safety issue

hypothesis: Supporting a small supplier group with soil-health practices improves resilience and reduces fertiliser dependency.
method: Pilot soil-health practice support with one supplier group.
decision_threshold: Improved resilience indicators without reducing farmer income
risk: Supplier burden or low evidence quality

hypothesis: A carbon and social-value checkpoint during concept design improves outcomes without unacceptable delay.
method: Add a concept-design decision checkpoint on one live project.
decision_threshold: Better design decisions without material planning delay
risk: Checkpoint is bypassed because of programme pressure

hypothesis: Showing compute-cost and estimated energy information during development reduces unnecessary resource use.
method: Add compute and estimated energy feedback to one engineering team workflow.
decision_threshold: Reduced avoidable compute with no product performance harm
risk: Energy estimates are too uncertain to guide decisions

hypothesis: Extending the minimum customer subscription period reduces transport and replacement impacts without excessive customer loss.
method: Test a longer minimum subscription period with one customer segment.
decision_threshold: Lower transport and replacement impact without unacceptable churn

hypothesis: A small electric-bus deployment on one route reduces emissions and pollution without reducing reliability or accessibility.
method: Deploy electric buses on one route with safeguards.
decision_threshold: Emissions reduction without reliability or accessibility decline

hypothesis: Substituting one laboratory solvent in a controlled research workflow reduces hazardous impact without reducing research quality or safety.
method: Test one solvent substitution in a controlled research workflow.
decision_threshold: Hazard reduction without research quality or safety failure
